# Trucker Cargo Insurance

Trucker Cargo Insurance is a commercial trucking insurance specialist serving owner-operators, independent truckers, and fleets across 48 states.

## Services

- Motor Truck Cargo Insurance — covers freight and cargo in your care, custody, and control during transit
- Primary Liability Insurance — FMCSA-required coverage protecting against bodily injury and property damage to third parties
- Physical Damage Insurance — covers your truck and trailer against collision, fire, theft, and other perils
- Bobtail / Non-Trucking Liability — protects you when operating your truck outside the scope of dispatch
- General Liability Insurance — covers premises and operations liability beyond auto coverage
- Fleet Insurance — multi-unit policies for carriers operating 2 or more power units

## Contact

- Phone: 844-967-5247
- Website: https://truckercargoinsurance.com
- Coverage: 48 states
- Quotes: Bindable quotes in under 5 minutes
- Claims: 24/7 claims response

## About

Backed by A+ rated carriers with FMCSA-compliant filings. Specializing in motor truck cargo, primary liability, physical damage, and bobtail/non-trucking liability for professional drivers and fleet operators nationwide.
